user.title: Configure SIP Client
user.description: Please enter your SIP extension credentials and server details.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the SIP server. Please check the host and port.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid username or password. Please verify your credentials.

abort.already_configured: This username and server combination is already configured.

number.name: Number
number.description: SIP target number or URI to dial (e.g. 100 or sip:100@freepbx).

menu.name: IVR menu
menu.description: Optional IVR menu configuration to run on the call.

ring_timeout.name: Ring timeout
ring_timeout.description: Seconds to let the call ring before canceling.

message.name: Message
message.description: Optional text message to speak via TTS upon connection.

tts_engine.name: TTS engine
tts_engine.description: Optional TTS engine to speak the message.

tts_options.name: TTS options
tts_options.description: Optional extra voice or speech settings.

hangup.name: Hang up
hangup.description: Ends the active SIP call or declines an incoming call.

sip_code.name: SIP status code
sip_code.description: Optional status code to send when rejecting a ringing call (e.g. 486 Busy Here).

menu.name: IVR menu
menu.description: Optional IVR menu configuration to start on answer.

message.name: Message
message.description: Optional text message to speak via TTS upon answering.

tts_engine.name: TTS engine
tts_engine.description: Optional TTS engine to speak the message.

tts_options.name: TTS options
tts_options.description: Optional extra voice or speech settings.

send_dtmf.name: Send DTMF
send_dtmf.description: Sends DTMF digits to the active SIP call.

start_recording.name: Start recording
start_recording.description: Starts recording call audio to a local WAV file.

recording_file.name: Recording file path
recording_file.description: Absolute path of the WAV file to save (e.g. /media/recording.wav).

start_assist.name: Start Assist
start_assist.description: Bridges the active call to Home Assistant's Voice Assist pipeline.
